name: Taiwan Strait
climate: Subtropical maritime; warm humid summers with typhoon risk; mild winters; northeast monsoon creates rough seas in winter

neighbors.name: South China Sea
neighbors.relevance: Taiwan Strait is the northern gateway to/from the SCS; linked escalation scenarios

neighbors.name: Pearl River Delta
neighbors.relevance: PRD electronics manufacturing depends on Taiwan semiconductor supply across the strait

neighbors.name: Greater Bay Area
neighbors.relevance: GBA tech sector's chip supply flows across the Taiwan Strait

neighbors.name: Yangtze River Delta
neighbors.relevance: YRD ports and industries rely on Taiwan Strait shipping lanes and semiconductor imports

neighbors.name: Indo-Pacific
neighbors.relevance: Taiwan Strait is the highest-stakes flashpoint in Indo-Pacific strategic competition

links.description: Taiwan Strait connects the East China Sea to the SCS; combined chokepoint risk for global trade
Quad members (US, Japan, Australia) have stated interest in Taiwan Strait peace and stability
AUKUS deterrence posture is partly designed to influence Taiwan Strait military balance
TSMC chip exports to PRD electronics factories cross the strait; blockade would halt production
Taiwan is not an RCEP member but its semiconductor exports underpin RCEP supply chains
Taiwan Strait stability is the defining security issue of the Indo-Pacific strategy
Five Eyes intelligence sharing supports monitoring of Taiwan Strait military developments
